_meta.transport: MCP Streamable-HTTP POST https://api.algovault.com/mcp (tools/call) + stdio. NOTE: get_market_regime is an x402-PAID tool (X402-CDP-BAZAAR-DISCOVERY-W1) — a live tools/call requires payment, so the canonical drift check is the vitest allow-list regression below.
_meta.purpose: Public-response-shape SoT for get_market_regime after the additive TradFi hardening fields. ADDITIVE-ONLY: metrics gains underlying_session (always) + session_note (closed/extended/pre-IPO only). NO existing field removed/renamed (Data Integrity). outcome_return_pct / Phase-E outcome WR must NEVER appear (Data Integrity LAW).

new_in_this_wave.metrics.underlying_session: ALWAYS present. enum: OPEN_REGULAR | OPEN_EXTENDED | CLOSED_WEEKEND | CLOSED_HOLIDAY | ALWAYS_OPEN | PREIPO_INTERNAL | UNKNOWN (TRADIFI-SIGNAL-HARDENING-W1)
new_in_this_wave.metrics.session_note: OMITTED for ALWAYS_OPEN / OPEN_REGULAR / UNKNOWN; present for OPEN_EXTENDED / CLOSED_WEEKEND / CLOSED_HOLIDAY / PREIPO_INTERNAL (TRADIFI-SIGNAL-HARDENING-W1)
new_in_this_wave.suggestion: when underlying_session is CLOSED_WEEKEND/CLOSED_HOLIDAY, a provisional-regime caveat sentence is APPENDED (no field shape change)

new_in_OPS-TRADFI-XVENUE-FUNDING-W1.metrics.funding_by_venue: OBJECT venue→{rate, interval_min, rate_8h_equiv}. Populated for TradFi (5-venue aggregation) AND crypto (HL predicted-fundings) paths. OMITTED for PREMARKET (fixed pre-IPO funding) and when no venue data is available. ADDITIVE.
new_in_OPS-TRADFI-XVENUE-FUNDING-W1.metrics.cross_venue_funding_sentiment: now POPULATED for TradFi symbols (was always 'Insufficient cross-venue data') — value change, same 3-value enum {BEARISH_BIAS, NEUTRAL, BULLISH_BIAS}
new_in_OPS-TRADFI-XVENUE-FUNDING-W1.metrics.funding_divergence_note: TradFi: cites ≥2 venues with 8h-normalized values + divergence verdict (band-calibrated). PREMARKET: 'Pre-IPO funding is fixed — cross-venue sentiment not applicable.' Crypto: unchanged.

error_contract.INSUFFICIENT_CANDLES: {error:'INSUFFICIENT_CANDLES', error_code:'INSUFFICIENT_CANDLES', message, candles_available, candles_required, suggested_timeframes:[], suggested_action} — isError:true (NEW this wave; replaces the legacy 'Insufficient candle data ...' plain string)
error_contract.TRADFI_SYMBOL_UNSUPPORTED_ON_VENUE: {error_code, message, coin, requested_exchange, suggested_venues:[], probed_at} — isError:true (v1.11.1)
error_contract.TIER_LIMIT_REACHED: {code, error_code, message, current_usage, monthly_limit, tier, suggested_upgrade_url, retry_after_days} — isError:true

cache_contract: no server-side response cache; computed per-call. underlyingType auto-detection cached 24h in-process (underlying-type.ts) with fail-open to static map.
consumers: x402 HTTP route POST /x402/get_market_regime (paid; same handler, two transports)
additive_only_rule: metrics may GAIN keys (underlying_session/session_note) but never LOSE the 11 pre-existing keys. A removed/renamed key or a forbidden_key appearing = Data Integrity violation → HALT.
drift_check_command: cd /Users/tank/code/crypto-quant-signal-mcp && npx vitest run tests/get-market-regime.test.ts tests/integration/trade-call-tradfi-hardening.test.ts   # regime metrics keys + session wiring; full-suite allow-list coverage
